title: Select CityWalk is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Select CityWalk is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
